text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is here. Kitasan Black, however, is
still reeling from Brusquement's sudden absence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But right then, Nice Nature steps in and tells her that how she runs will decide whether the audience will even notice that the main star is missing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her unease thus dispelled, Kitasan Black is
able to bounce back and run the race with
renewed spirit.
